episodes.title: A More Sure Word: From Deception to the Sufficiency of Scripture
episodes.description:
There are many who have walked through spiritual deception, manipulation, or high-control church environments and are left asking: Where do I go from here?

A More Sure Word exists as a place of refuge for those rebuilding their faith after confusion — particularly for those healing from hyper-charismatic, New Apostolic Reformation, and Word of Faith church environments.

This space is centered on the sufficiency of Scripture and the steadiness of Christ as our foundation.

If you are relearning what it means to test what you are taught, to rebuild carefully, and to anchor your faith in something objective and unshaken, you are not alone :)

If you are seeking peer support, I facilitate a bi-weekly Zoom group focused on processing the aftermath of spiritual abuse, particularly for those leaving Word of Faith, New Apostolic Reformation, and hyper-charismatic church environments. If you would like more information — or if you are interested in sharing your story on the channel — you are welcome to reach out.

Connect:
Priscillacyanni@gmail.com
